mnemonics.title: OLAP Operations
mnemonics.content: Slicing Dices, Drilling Pivots (SDPR): Slice, Dice, Pivot, Roll-up/Drill-down.

acronyms.usage: Process for data ingestion into warehouses.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine bookshelves organized by book attributes (color, genre) instead of individual books.

analogies.analogy: Row storage = library organized by books; Columnar = library organized by chapters across books.
